=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Liam Craft

Statement of Offence:
Being concerned in the supply of a controlled drug of Class A, namely cocaine, contrary to section 4(2)(b) of the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971.

Particulars of Offence:
Between 1 November 2025 and 28 February 2026 at Northgate and elsewhere were concerned in the supply of cocaine to others.

=== SECTION: MG5 ===

MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT

URN: 26/DA/005
Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty
Officer in case: DS Kerr 5501

Headline Summary
Encro-style message extracts are served. Handle NIGHTLINE-77 appears in thread. Mapping of handle/phone to Liam Craft is not proved on current papers. Platform extraction, attribution report, subscriber data, and device continuity are outstanding.

Chronological summary
11/2025 — Operation targeting county-lines network on Encro-style pl
